Dr. Chloe Adams

Lead Materials Scientist

European Space Agency (ESA)

Biography Profile

Dr. Adams specializes in metamaterials engineered for exotic gravitational interactions. Her team at ESA recently synthesized a novel alloy that exhibits negative mass characteristics under specific cryogenic conditions. She holds a double doctorate in Chemistry and Physics.

Symposium Presentation

"Metamaterials for Negative Mass Simulation"

An exploration of the synthesis and properties of the newly discovered 'Alloy-88'. We will discuss its potential to act as a physical substrate for anti-gravity drive cores.
